Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
6.26 Commodities and commodity shops
(See also:
HELP SHOPS
,
HELP MINES
,
HELP LEASES
,
HELP WAREHOUSES
,
HELP SHIPFITTING
,
HELP
COMMODITY
MARKET
)
Commodities
-----------
Iron, silver,
gold
, platinum, steel, coal, gems,
bone
, obsidian, stone,
wood
,
cloth
,
rope
, and the like.
They may be found in
city
commodity
shops
. These shops may
buy
or
sell
, unlike most
other
types of shops which only sell. The commodity market is where most
commodities can be bought or sold (see HELP COMMODITY MARKET).
Many types of
comms
may also be produced by players in our
Mining
system
. See
HELP MINES
for more details. Fibre for cloth and rope, and wood are produced
by players via our
Foraging
system. See
HELP FORAGING
for details.
When any commodity is removed from the
rift
or warehouse, or when purchased from a commodity
shop
, it will begin to
decay
. They will last for 8
hours
(that's 8 real life hours).
Ship
Commodities
----------------
These can be made from regular commodities, or will be awarded when dismantling
ship
equipment
or
ships
. These are used to make ship equipment and alter the
appearance of your ship.
Shipcloth - 50x cloth
Shipiron - 50x iron, 10x steel
Shipwood - 50x wood, 10x iron
Shiplines - 50x rope, 10x iron
Pitch - 50x wood, 10x animal fat
Commodities Shops
-----------------
Commodity shops are now mostly defunct, aside from those owned by the
cities
,
two remain in the lands (
Luman
village and
Zanzibaar
isle) and these sell
lacquer.
If lacquer in a shop is sold out, the price will likely get raised when it
is restocked. Similarly, if there is a large surplus, the price will likely
get lowered.
(See also:
HELP SHOPS
,
HELP MINES
,
HELP LEASES
,
HELP WAREHOUSES
,
HELP SHIPFITTING
, HELP COMMODITY MARKET)
